dict.string: Voco needs microphone access to transcribe your speech in real-time for dictation and meeting recording.
Voco needs Screen Recording permission to capture system audio (e.g., video calls, browser audio) during meetings. Voco does not record or save your screen — only the audio.
Voco needs Accessibility access to paste transcribed text into the app you're currently using.
Voco needs Input Monitoring to detect your dictation hotkey (e.g. Left Option) even when Voco is in the background. Keystrokes are never logged or stored.
